name: Paranoid
short_description: Paranoid is Dungeoncrawler/Roguelike with an oldschool pixelartstyle where you need to survive alone in the dark and discover new items and pills that help you through this dangerous World. Can you find a way out and wake up?
detailed_description:
You wake up in the middle of the night. You turn arround trying to fall back to sleep, but you hear something tapping against the floorboards... Faintly. Almost as if it's in the distance. You turn your lights on and listen closely at the sound. Your stomach drops... You look arround and find your trusty Gun and a flashlight. Best grab it and explore. You have to find a way out of this nightmare and wake up.

Gameplay

* Find a way out of a random generated Dungeon
* Find Pills that can help you to survive... or will they?
* The Shopkeeper has lots of goods for you
* Find Lightsources and Batteries or you will be blind for whats coming
* Kill Enemies to get Items that help you along your way
